home.intro: I'm Kooraseru, though you might know me by my another name. This is my personal website, which I experiment with and build fun wacky experiments. This website runs off of GitHub Pages, and the source code is available on GitHub. Feel free to check it out and ~steal~ borrow any code you find interesting!

portfolio.title: Portfolio & Projects
portfolio.subtitle: A selection of things I've built.

projects.title: My Site!
projects.description: This very website! A personal portfolio and devlog built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
projects.details: A personal website featuring block scrolling, a theme and language system, confetti particles, and a project card carousel. Built from scratch without any frameworks.

projects.title: Registry
projects.description: A script registry and runtime manager for LuaU. Acts as a module loader and bundler, in other words a Library Manager.
projects.details: A script registry and runtime manager for LuaU. Acts as a module loader and bundler, in other words a Library Manager.

projects.title: Mod-Mail
projects.description: A discord bot for managing moderation tasks.
projects.details: A discord bot for managing moderation tasks. Runs off of Rust on an external server. Uses the Serenity library and features a web dashboard for configuration. Currently in early development, but the bot is already functional and can be invited to servers.

projects.title: Clinical Trials Lookup
projects.description: A tool for looking up information about clinical trials.
projects.details: A tool for looking up information about clinical trials. Runs off of Rust on an external server. Made for an independent project in collaboration with wonderful individuals at Vanderbilt University and Georgetown University. Accesses the ClinicalTrials.gov API to search for specific queries to return relevant clinical trials, personnel, organizations, sponsors, and more.

projects.title: WeldHelper
projects.description: Extension/Plugin toolkit for Roblox welding tools.

skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I'm comfortable with.
skills.body: Usage and knowledge of these tools vary.
